overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a narrow neon-lit market street in a dystopian city. The character passes food stalls and glowing advertisements before turning up a concrete stairway at the end.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cyberpunk market street with neon food stalls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the market corridor passing vendors and neon signs on both sides

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shirt and shorts walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement for chicken restaurant hanging above the street
green food stall with red neon 'BURRITO' signage
tall green cylindrical skyscraper with numerous balconies and air conditioning units
pink neon sign shaped like a palm tree on the left building facade
overhanging roof structure covering market stalls on the left side

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow enclosed market street lined with neon-lit food stalls. The Chick N Crisp billboard looms ahead while a burrito stand glows on the right. Pedestrians walk in opposing directions through the corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching toy store intersection with construction area

events.description: passing the neon-lit toy store with bicycle logo on the left

agents.ego_description: continuing forward as the toy store entrance approaches and construction workers become visible near the stairway

notable_agents.action: construction workers in yellow safety vests standing near the scaffolding

entered.detail: storefront with neon bicycle logo and red 'TOYS' lettering
orange metal scaffolding structure against the right wall
stacked digital billboards displaying vehicle advertisements

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the end of the market street where a neon toy store sign glows on the left. Construction scaffolding appears on the right as the Chick N Crisp billboard recedes behind. The green tower looms closer overhead.

events.description: turning right to ascend the concrete stairs
entering the construction area with orange scaffolding and safety barriers

agents.ego_description: turning right and walking up the stairs past construction workers in hard hats

notable_agents.action: construction worker in yellow hard hat ascending the stairs ahead

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs leading upward to the right
construction barriers and wooden pallets stacked near the scaffolding
elevated pedestrian bridge or train track structure overhead

segments.scene_description: The character turns right and ascends a concrete stairway flanked by orange construction scaffolding. The market street falls away behind as the character enters a more industrial construction zone under an overhead walkway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a claustrophobic neon market that gradually ascends into an industrial construction zone. It begins by navigating a narrow corridor lined with glowing food stalls and pedestrians, moving toward a looming Chick N Crisp billboard. As the camera advances, the market street opens slightly to reveal a neon toy store on the left and the first signs of construction scaffolding on the right, while a massive green tower grows more prominent overhead. The scene then shifts as the character turns right, ascending a concrete stairway flanked by orange scaffolding that causes the vibrant market to fall away below. Finally, the movement leads upward and under an overhead walkway, transitioning fully into a stark, industrial environment.
